WBR Notes:
The team held a weekly business review (WBR) meeting to discuss certification metrics, headcount changes, and domain updates.
Rylee Velazquez presented certification data showing 78 total DAAs and 29 DQAs, with significant growth in certifications, while noting that all P0 pools are over 100% capacity.
Robyn Davidson announced two DQAs moving to another team with corresponding DAA backfills, plus one team lead and six bilingual DQAs moving to I18N, leaving open positions that will not be immediately backfilled.
The team discussed domain updates including redacted being on pause due to tooling issues, another domain is moving to 3.1 production, and ongoing other certification efforts.
Claire and Jonah addressed the need to align on SLA table metrics and quality reporting systems, with Jonah noting that decreasing human annotations across workflows may impact future headcount needs.
